title: SOL 4 Pairs Small Household Gloves, Yellow Heavy Duty Rubber Gloves for Cleaning with Non-Slip Grip, Durable Waterproof Design for Kitchen, Bathroom & Dishwashing, Multipurpose & Comfortable To Use
features: Versatile for All Chores - These small rubber gloves are a ideal for every task, from washing dishes to scrubbing surfaces. With 4 pairs included, these household cleaning gloves provide reliable protection and comfort for daily household use.

Comfortable Fit - Designed with flexibility in mind, these cleaning gloves small provide a snug yet comfortable fit. Measuring 290mm in length with a 90mm width under the thumb, they’re ideal washing up gloves or dishwashing gloves for everyday tasks

Gentle on Hands - Crafted to be easy on the hands, these small rubber gloves are a comfortable choice for household work. Perfect kitchen gloves for washing dishes or for general cleaning, helping to protect skin from water and detergents.

Long Cuff Protection - Featuring an 11mm cuff, these long gloves for cleaning keep water out, making them ideal heavy duty washing up gloves. Great for tasks that need extra coverage, offering a secure barrier for both light and heavy-duty chores.

Bright & Cheerful Colour - With a cheerful colour, these washing gloves add a bit of brightness to your cleaning routine! Great kitchen gloves for washing dishes and versatile enough for all-around household use, they make chores a little lighter.

Yes, these small rubber gloves are ideal for a variety of chores, including washing dishes, cleaning surfaces, and general household tasks. With 4 pairs included, they provide reliable protection for hands during daily use. What material are these gloves made from? These gloves are crafted from durable rubber, ensuring they hold up well under regular use. They provide excellent grip, making them ideal for household tasks like washing up and cleaning. Do these gloves offer good protection for hands? Absolutely. The gloves feature a long cuff for added protection, helping to keep water and cleaning products out. This makes them ideal for both light and heavy-duty chores, providing extra peace of mind. Are these gloves comfortable to wear for extended periods? Yes, the gloves are designed for a snug yet comfortable fit, allowing easy hand movement. With a length of 290mm and flexible material, they’re ideal for everyday cleaning without causing discomfort. Can these gloves be used for kitchen and bathroom cleaning? Definitely. These versatile gloves work well in both the kitchen and bathroom, making them excellent for washing dishes, wiping surfaces, and other cleaning tasks. The bright colour adds a touch of cheer to any chore.
